definition: Attacks against: advantage if adjacent (5 ft), disadvantage if ranged. Half movement to stand.
Fails sight checks. Attacks: disadvantage. Attacks against: advantage.
Incapacitated, can't move. Attacks against: advantage. Fails STR/DEX saves.
Disadvantage on checks/attacks while source visible. Can't willingly move closer.
Speed becomes 0. Ends if grappler incapacitated or creature moves out of reach.
Speed 0. Attacks: disadvantage. Attacks against: advantage. DEX saves: disadvantage.
Can't take actions or reactions.
Incapacitated, can't move or speak. Auto-fail STR/DEX saves. Attacks: advantage (crit within 5 ft).
Can't attack the charmer. Charmer has advantage on social checks.
Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.
Can't hear. Auto-fails checks requiring hearing.
Impossible to see without special sense. Attacks: advantage. Attacks against: disadvantage.
Stone. Weight x10. Incapacitated. Resistance to all damage. Immune to poison/disease.
Incapacitated, drops items, falls prone. Auto-fail STR/DEX. Attacks: advantage (crit within 5 ft).
Stacks 1-6: disadvantage checks, speed halved, disadvantage attacks/saves, speed 0, max HP halved, death.
Damaged: CON save (DC 10 or half damage). New concentration spell ends previous.
Rogue: extra 1d6/2 levels/turn with finesse/ranged + advantage OR ally adjacent to target.
Triggered leaving reach voluntarily. Uses reaction; one melee attack.
Roll two d20s, use higher.
Roll two d20s, use lower.
Once per round, immediate response to trigger. Resets on your turn.
Additional action beyond main Action (specific abilities grant one).
Extra movement equal to speed this turn.
Movement doesn't provoke OAs this turn.
Ally gets advantage on check, OR on attack vs creature within 5 ft.
Until next turn: attacks against you disadvantage, DEX saves advantage.
Hold action for specified trigger before next turn.
Athletics vs Athletics/Acrobatics: push 5 ft or knock prone.
Athletics vs Athletics/Acrobatics: target becomes Grappled.
Optional: two allies on opposite sides get melee advantage.
Half: +2 AC/DEX. Three-quarters: +5. Full: can't be targeted.
d20 + ability mod + proficiency (if proficient). Meet/beat DC.
d20 + ability mod + proficiency (if applicable). Meet/beat DC.
DC target. 5 very easy, 10 easy, 15 medium, 20 hard, 25 very hard, 30 nearly impossible.
+2 (L1-4), +3 (L5-8), +4 (L9-12). Added to proficient skills, saves, attacks, spell DCs.
Double proficiency bonus for chosen skill/tool.
10 + Perception mod. Detects hidden creatures, traps, secret doors without rolling.
d20 + DEX mod at combat start. Determines turn order.
AC target number to hit.
HP vitality measure. 0 HP = unconscious + death saves.
d20 at 0 HP: 10+ success, 9- failure. 3 successes = stable. 3 failures = death. Nat 20 = 1 HP.
Extra HP buffer. Doesn't stack. Lost first. Can't be healed.
Short rest healing pool. Roll + CON mod per die. Regain half on long rest.
Nat 20: double damage dice, always hits.
Auto-miss on attacks regardless of modifiers.
Light melee attack then bonus action off-hand attack (no ability mod unless Fighting Style).
Use STR or DEX for attack and damage.
One- or two-handed, two-handed uses higher die.
+5 ft melee range (10 ft total). Affects OAs.
Ranged attack using STR, same damage die.
Small creatures: disadvantage on attacks.
Enables two-weapon fighting without Dual Wielder feat.
Resource to cast spells. Higher slots = stronger effects. Recovered on long rest.
Level 0. At will. Damage scales at 5th, 11th, 17th.
Cast without slot, +10 min cast time.
d20 + spellcasting mod + proficiency vs AC.
8 + proficiency + spellcasting ability mod.
V = verbal, S = somatic, M = material. War Caster helps with S.
Higher slot for enhanced effects.
1+ hour. Spend Hit Dice to heal. Some abilities recharge.
8 hours (6 sleeping). Full HP, half max Hit Dice, reset most abilities/slots.
2 ft cost per 1 ft moved.
2 ft per 1 ft (1 ft with climb speed). Athletics on difficult surfaces.
2 ft per 1 ft (1 ft with swim speed). Athletics in rough water.
Dim light becomes bright, darkness becomes dim (greyscale). Usually 60 ft.
Lightly obscured. Perception disadvantage (sight).
Normal vision.
Effectively blinded. Darkness, opaque fog, dense foliage.
Half damage from type. Doesn't stack.
Double damage from type.
No damage from type. Blocks related conditions.
Short rest, 3 item limit. Some magic items require it.
STR x5 no penalty, x10 speed -10 ft, x15 max carry (speed -20 ft, disadvantage).
Fighter: +1 action on turn. 1/short rest.
Fighter: bonus action 1d10 + level HP. 1/short rest.
Rogue: Dash/Disengage/Hide as bonus action.
Bard: bonus action, ally gets die (d6-d12) for attack/check/save.
Rogue: reaction to halve damage from visible attacker.
2 attacks per Attack action (3 at 11th, 4 at 20th for Fighter).
Battle Master: d8 pool (4-5-6 dice). Fuel maneuvers. Short/long rest.
Halfling: reroll nat 1s. Feat: 3 luck points for extra d20s.
Goliath: reaction 1d12 + CON mod damage reduction. 1/short rest.
Tortle: action +4 AC, advantage STR/CON saves, speed 0, disadvantage DEX saves, no reactions.
Dragonborn: action elemental damage line/cone. DC 8 + CON + proficiency. 2d6 scaling. 1/short rest.
